name: integration_the_headlines_on_monetization_in_2026
method:
The headlines on monetization in 2026:

AI sells, but it doesn’t stick: AI-powered apps generate 41% more revenue per payer but churn 30% faster

 Web monetization is a defining trait of success: 41%

phases.name: audit_web_monetization
steps: categorize apps: has_web_payment vs app_only vs no_payment

phases.name: add_web_payments
steps: generate Stripe payment links for unmonetized apps
inject payment CTA into landing pages
add anti-churn streak reinforcement UI to AI apps

phases.name: monitor_churn
steps: set up weekly churn rate check via Stripe MCP
